title: IP as Server Name
description: When adding a new server, if a name isn't provided, use the IP address or actual name.
body:
# IP as Server Name

## Overview

When adding a new server, if a name isn't provided, the mod will save the server with its IP address as the name, however if the server is registered on the [Lunar Client server mappings](https://github.com/LunarClient/ServerMappings), its name will be used instead.

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rCxpexeJ/images/3252d4ec161d299d99b212db8cea7da01af4e001.gif)

## Outdated? Bugs? Crashes?
Join the NowThisIsCrazy Discord, most of my mods are only maintained upon request and handled within the same day, so just ask!
